gate.start_hint: Select a terminal and open the shift, then move to the register to manage the cart and tender.
gate.branch_hint: Terminals and invoices follow the active branch on your account.

register.need_shift: Open a shift from the shift screen first.
register.cart_hint: Items selected for the current sale
register.shift_error_title: Could not load the active shift
register.discount_code_hint: Amount is taken from the promotion rule (percentage or fixed amount).
register.sale_items_hint: Search by name or SKU, then add the required quantity
register.products_empty: Search for a product to add it to the cart
register.products_empty_hint: Use the search field above to find products by name, SKU, or barcode.
register.total_panel_hint: Review the cart, then lock it before tender

pending.title: Pending invoices
pending.description: Parked or pending carts appear here when available.

tender.title: Tender
tender.need_online_intent: Network is required to create a payment intent.
tender.partial_cash_needs_customer: Assign a customer on the cart to record the shortfall as receivable when paying less than the total in cash.

return.title: Return
return.scan_hint: Enter invoice number (e.g. INV-…) or scan barcode
return.submit_help: After loading the invoice into the cart: lower quantities for items the customer returns, add catalog items for new purchases. «Register return» posts the difference as a return; the cart stays for checkout as a new sale.
return.replace_cart_confirm: The cart has items. Replace them with the invoice lines?
return.loaded_cart: Invoice lines were added to the cart.
return.loaded_cart_hint: Adjust the cart, open «Return» again, then press «Register return» when ready.
return.need_cart: An active sale cart is required.
return.reload_invoice: Search the same invoice again or reload.
return.exchange_line_missing: The cart is missing a line that matches an invoice row — use «Load invoice into cart» again.
return.none_return_qty: Nothing to return was calculated (lower a loaded invoice line qty in the cart).
return.auto_load_need_empty_cart: Empty the cart to auto-load this invoice, or use «Reload into cart» to replace.

shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
shortcuts.checkout: Checkout — keyboard shortcuts may be added later

customer.unsupported: Adding and attaching a customer to the current cart needs a dedicated API endpoint. This sale will remain walk-in for now.

payment.capture_failed: Capture failed — it may have already been processed.
